bricks.blueprint_yaml:
name: compute_median
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 12 steps
inputs:
  values: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${inputs.values}
    do_brick: set_dict_field
    item_kwarg: value
    static_kwargs:
      data: {}
      field: v
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_1_for_each
- name: step_2_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_1_for_each.result}
    key: result
  save_as: step_2_map_values
- name: step_3_sort_dict_list
  brick: sort_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_2_map_values.result}
    key: v
  save_as: step_3_sort_dict_list
- name: step_4_count_dict_list
  brick: count_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_sort_dict_list.result}
  save_as: step_4_count_dict_list
- name: step_5_reduce_sum
  brick: reduce_sum
  params:
    values:
    - ${step_4_count_dict_list.result}
    - -1
  save_as: step_5_reduce_sum
- name: step_6_divide
  brick: divide
  params:
    a: ${step_4_count_dict_list.result}
    b: 2.0
  save_as: step_6_divide
- name: step_7_floor_value
  brick: floor_value
  params:
    value: ${step_6_divide.result}
  save_as: step_7_floor_value
- name: step_8_reduce_sum
  brick: reduce_sum
  params:
    values:
    - ${step_7_floor_value.result}
    - 1
  save_as: step_8_reduce_sum
- name: step_9_divide
  brick: divide
  params:
    a: ${step_5_reduce_sum.result}
    b: 2.0
  save_as: step_9_divide
- name: step_10_floor_value
  brick: floor_value
  params:
    value: ${step_9_divide.result}
  save_as: step_10_floor_value
- name: step_11_slice_dict_list
  brick: slice_dict_list
  params:
    items: ${step_3_sort_dict_list.result}
    start: ${step_10_floor_value.result}
    end: ${step_8_reduce_sum.result}
  save_as: step_11_slice_dict_list
- name: step_12_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_11_slice_dict_list.result}
    field: v
    operation: avg
  save_as: step_12_calculate_aggregates
outputs_map:
  median: ${step_12_calculate_aggregates.result}
bricks_log_signals: bricks.ai.composer INFO Composing blueprint for task (80 chars), 102 bricks in pool
